'''laroyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mmag|mmag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mmag|mmag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| laroyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læreyeth|læreyeth]] || [[word:læreyej|læreyej]] || [[word:læreyesh|læreyesh]] || [[word:læreye|læreye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:laroroyoth|laroroyoth]] || [[word:laroroyoj|laroroyoj]] || [[word:laroroyosh|laroroyosh]] || [[word:laroroyo|laroroyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:laroyoth|laroyoth]] || [[word:laroyoj|laroyoj]] || [[word:laroyosh|laroyosh]] || [[word:laroyo|laroyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:larofyoth|larofyoth]] || [[word:larofyoj|larofyoj]] || [[word:larofyosh|larofyosh]] || [[word:larofyof|larofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:laroyotho|laroyotho]] || [[word:laroyojo|laroyojo]] || [[word:laroyosho|laroyosho]] || [[word:laroyoko|laroyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:laroyoth|laroyoth]] || [[word:laroyoj|laroyoj]] || [[word:laroyosh|laroyosh]] || [[word:laroyo|laroyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:laroyothol|laroyothol]] || [[word:laroyojol|laroyojol]] || [[word:laroyoshol|laroyoshol]] || [[word:laroyokol|laroyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:laroyothotho|laroyothotho]] || [[word:laroyojojo|laroyojojo]] || [[word:laroyoshosho|laroyoshosho]] || [[word:laroyoko|laroyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:laroyothon|laroyothon]] || [[word:laroyojon|laroyojon]] || [[word:laroyoshon|laroyoshon]] || [[word:laroyokon|laroyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:laroyothoro|laroyothoro]] || [[word:laroyojoro|laroyojoro]] || [[word:laroyoshoro|laroyoshoro]] || [[word:laroyokoro|laroyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
